summary: Single proposal pc_crash_oversold_global_long_extreme_long is mathematically healthy: all 3 novel_dim conditions parse against SUPPORTED_FIELDS, structurally distinct from E066 via capitulation gauge, but conjunction of p90 + crash + taker filter yields tight sample around ~45 triggers — still worth Phase 3 entry, pair with fixed exit family.

analyses.distinctness_notes: E066 (pc_crash_taker_buy_long, +0.339) is closest cousin: crash + taker_buy_ratio + long, but uses no magnitude floor and no sentiment-extreme filter. This proposal adds (a) move_pct<=-4 crash-magnitude floor (sharper crash, not mild dips) and (b) global_long_ratio_extreme (≥p90 retail-long capitulation/euphoria gauge) — a counter-trend capitulation thesis distinct from generic crash-bounce. Also distinct from E126/E064 which are pc_PUMP archetypes (opposite event_type). The 3-way conjunction on crash×taker_strength×retail-extreme is not represented in the top entries preview or known registry.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: ~5000 pricechange events × ~0.25 move_pct<=-4 (crash with ≥4% magnitude is roughly upper-mid crash bucket; raw crashes ~50%, but the -4% floor is tighter) × ~0.35 taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55 (bullish taker pressure during crash is moderately rare) × ~0.10 global_long_ratio_extreme (p90 by definition) ≈ 5000 × 0.25 × 0.35 × 0.10 ≈ 44. Conservative; could be lower if conditions are correlated negatively (extreme retail-long during sharp crash + bullish taker reversal is a specific capitulation moment).
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Pair with FIXED exit family — coverage_summary shows fixed is the only exit family with positive mean (0.175) and 6680/7320 positive results; multi_tp/trail/time_only/breakeven all negative across the board. For a counter-trend bounce thesis, prefer tight TP (0.5–1.5%) with moderate-to-wide SL since crash-bounces are quick mean-reversion plays — but heed the R2 E126 paper trap: avoid asymmetric TP/SL like 0.51/6.00 even if backtest score looks high. Recommend GPU surface explore tp∈[0.5,2.0], sl∈[1.0,3.0] keeping TP/SL ratio ≥ 0.3 to avoid left-tail blowups.
